import io
import string
import list

fn parse_all(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
            when Some(x)
              x
            when None
              0
            end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      if not in_num
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      end
      in_num = true
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
    else if b == 45 and not in_num
      in_num = true
      sign = -1
      val = 0
    else
      if in_num
        nums = list.push(nums, sign * val)
      end
      in_num = false
      sign = 1
      val = 0
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    nums = list.push(nums, sign * val)
  end
  nums
end

fn dedup(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut uniq: List<Int> = []
  for x in xs
    if not list.contains(uniq, x)
      uniq = list.push(uniq, x)
    end
  end
  uniq
end

fn insert_sorted(_ ys: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  for y in ys
    if not inserted and x <= y
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, y)
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut s: List<Int> = []
  for x in xs
    s = insert_sorted(s, x)
  end
  s
end

fn format_line(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in xs
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
  end
  out
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let nums = parse_all(input)
let uniq = dedup(nums)
let sorted = sort_asc(uniq)
println(format_line(sorted))
